summary: First-finish smoke test of Student Portal (Supabase-backed FastAPI + React). Backend auth, CRUD, and RBAC are all working. Student login/dashboard and Admin login/dashboard render correctly with real data. Full test submission flow via API confirmed (score computed, grade row created). SQL injection blocked by Pydantic email validator.
passed: POST /api/auth/login for student and admin returns JWT + user payload
GET /api/tests returns 2 seeded tests (Python Basics, JavaScript Fundamentals)
GET /api/tests/{id} returns 5 MCQ questions with options and marks
POST /api/tests/submit computed score=5/25 correctly, is_flagged=false for tab_switch_count=2, created grade row
GET /api/grades returns the newly created grade entry
RBAC: student token on /api/admin/stats returns 403 'Admin access required'
SQL injection payload in email field rejected by email validator (422)
Frontend login page loads with test credential hint card
Student dashboard shows tabs (Dashboard/Tests/Assignments/Grades/Announcements) and stat cards (Available Tests=2, Assignments=3, Grades=1, Announcements=3)
Admin dashboard renders stat cards (Total Students=1, Total Tests=2, Assignments=3, Violations=0) plus Recent Tests list
Logout returns user to login page

failed.issue: POST /api/admin/tests requires 'total_marks' at body root (in addition to per-question 'marks'). Not a bug per se, but confirm the admin UI passes it; documenting so main agent verifies the create-test modal sends total_marks.
failed.evidence: 422 with 'Field required' when body omitted total_marks

action_items: Verify AdminDashboard 'Create Test' modal sends total_marks in the request body (backend requires it).

Optional: full testing agent should exercise UI-driven test taking (start test, select answers, submit) and tab-switch anti-cheat (>5 switches flagging) via Playwright, plus admin create-test modal end-to-end.
